description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached garage, a paved driveway, and a small front yard featuring a tree and shrubbery. The main building has a light-colored facade with multiple symmetrically arranged windows and a central front door, flanked by shutters. The roof is primarily gabled with a section of flat roofing, and the rear of the house includes a patio area and a small rectangular pool. The garage is positioned to the left of the main house, connected by the driveway, and a white car is parked in front. The landscaping includes several trees and green lawn patches, with paved walkways surrounding the house. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, with clean lines and balanced proportions.
description: A two-story Colonial-style house with a detached garage, paved driveway, symmetrical windows, and landscaped yard with trees and a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, detached garage, driveway, and a car parked in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, large tree, and the paved area between the house and garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, pool, and French doors leading to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, rear patio, pool, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, flanked by windows and shutters, no porch or columns, simple overhang.
